name: Psionic Potential
description: You have awakened to your latent psionic abilities. Your mental focus enhances your psionic power.

name: Awakened Telekinetic
description: You have awakened to telekinetic abilities. You can manipulate objects with your mind.

name: Awakened Biokinetic
description: You have awakened to biokinetic abilities. You can enhance and control your body.

name: Awakened Telepath
description: You have awakened to telepathic abilities. You can read and influence minds.

name: Awakened Pyrokinetic
description: You have awakened to pyrokinetic abilities. You can manipulate heat and fire.

name: Awakened Electrokinetic
description: You have awakened to electrokinetic abilities. You can manipulate electricity.

name: Awakened Photokinetic
description: You have awakened to photokinetic abilities. You can manipulate light.

name: Awakened Clairsentient
description: You have awakened to clairsentient abilities. You can sense beyond normal perception.

name: Awakened Teleporters
description: You have awakened to teleportation abilities. You can warp space.

name: Awakened Vitakinetic
description: You have awakened to vitakinetic abilities. You can manipulate life energy.
